channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: The bins by Garfield house., 26th June
item.description:
Please sort out

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Bristol Walk, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Medium - Up to medium size van load

item.title: 1100 Litre Metal Wheelie Upside Down - Obstructing Pedestrian Walkway and Access, 26th June
item.description:
Problem: Wheelie Bin Obstructing Pedestrian Walkway Location: Outside Flat 3 Kingsmead House, E9 5QH Impact: Communal door blocked. Risk of injury and entrapment for visually impaired pedestrians. Reduced access for emergency services.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kingsmead Way, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Food waste bin has graffiti, 26th June
item.description:
Please

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Bristol Walk, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside Waitrose opposite Canfield Place, 26th June
item.description:
Rocking. It's a trip hazard, I caught my foot on it.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2, Canfield Place, South Hampstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Not a tree, but a toxic plant on roadside, 26th June
item.description:
Giant Hogweed (Heracleum mantegazzianium) on side of road at What3Words vent.vanish.august. Sap highly toxic to human skin. The plant is not on the pavement side of the road but is close to the entrance to the Cray Riverway. Danger of someone going to investigate and picking or pulling pieces off the plant, getting sap on skin. I noticed this plant today.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Maiden Lane, Barnes Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead fox, 26th June
item.description:
Dead fox
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): The Slade, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pothole aroung manhole, 26th June
item.description:
The tarmac around the manhole is breaking up and causing a pothole
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Southend Road, Beckenham, Greater London

item.title: Street light not working, 26th June
item.description:
Not been working for over a week, outside No 2 Nightingale Road near to the alleyway
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Nightingale Road, Poverest, Greater London

item.title: Flytip been there 2 weeks, 26th June
item.description:
Flytip rubbish been dumped been there over 2 weeks, about 30 council tippers just drove past and left it

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Rochdale Road, Abbey Wood

item.title: Tree branches are hanging too low so people have to bend to go under., 26th June
item.description:
Tree branches are hanging too low so people have to bend to go under.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 177, Croydon Road, Elmers End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Drivers moving cones and driving over fragile road making hole, 26th June
item.description:
Because of lack of information signing on Hamlet road, drivers are mistakenly thinking the road closure is due to annual Festival Republic event relatable ternp road closures rather than a weak road. A broken recycling box is still places in the hole so local drivers don't know what the problem is and are moving the cones which is normal practice for Festival Republic related road closures on several of the surrounding roads.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hamlet Road, Crystal Palace, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Coventry close, 26th June
item.description:
Please clean

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Coventry Close, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: On the street, 26th June

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Coventry Close, London

item.category: Fly-tip Medium - Up to medium size van load (Estates)

item.title: Tree loose not rectified, 26th June
item.description:
Why do you keep closing my report without any real feedback. No one has attended the tree. I do pay my council tax so what is the issue with the council fixing their property that damaging cars.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sheringham Road, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Albert way, 26th June
item.description:
Constant fly tipping every day/ night at entrance on right hand side from furniture to builders crap garden waste
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Studholme Street, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Corner of Albert way/studholme st, 26th June
item.description:
Dog poo bin always over flowing doesn’t get emptied enough looks and smells disgusting
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Studholme Street, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Weeds, 26th June

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Albert Way, Peckham, Greater London

item.title: Drain blocked with soil - causing flooding, 26th June
item.description:
Drain is blocked with soil. Please unblock. Blocked drains is causing flooding It is outside 41 Durham Road Unable to upload pictures
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Durham Road, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
